calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Davis.
Petitioner: Kevin Kuang, present in pro per, as guardian ad litem for minors, Tristen Reeder and Kristen Reeder, was sworn and examined.
Without proper notification to and consent by the minors' mother, the plaintiff's Petition for Change of Name of Minors is DENIED Without Prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Reset To Nov-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Petitioner: Kevin Kuang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Tristen Kuang and Kristen Kuang, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's mother consent, proper proof of service or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Nov. 28, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit a VALID proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or an Application with Declaration for an Order dispensing with notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Denied
